resources.string: Biometric sensors are not available right now.\nPlease, use your PIN, graphic key, or device password to confirm your identity.

%1$s

Warning: %2$s could not verify the security of one of the accessibility services - it may record your PIN, graphic key, or device password.
Continue only if you are completely sure that your actions are safe.
WideGamut prevent from proper optical sensor work
Required permissions not granted
Camera sensor blocked by privacy toggle
Cryptography not supported with DeviceCredential fallback
Credentials requested, but user cancel verification
Error occurred during Cryptography verification
Initialization takes too long
Suspicious accessibility service detected, the user decides to interrupt the biometric
Unable to start biometric authentication cause of app window is not in the foreground
Unblock device microphone
Unblock device camera
Unblock
To use Face Unlock, turn on Camera access in Settings > Privacy
Face operation canceled.
Can’t verify face. Hardware not available.
Face Unlock isn’t supported on this device
Too many attempts. Try again later.
Too many attempts. Face Unlock unavailable.
Too many attempts. Enter screen lock instead.
Can’t store new face data. Delete an old one first.
You haven’t set up Face Unlock
Sensor temporarily disabled.
Try Face Unlock again
Can’t verify face. Try again.
Face Unlock canceled by user
Something went wrong. Try again.
Verify it\u2019s you
Use your biometric to continue
Use your fingerprint to continue
Use your face to continue
